projectDescription: A Windows desktop application that converts speech to text and text to speech, sending output as OSC messages to VRChat avatars with integrations for Spotify, heart rate, voice commands, and 15+ TTS engines.
keyFeatures: Speech-to-Text via Azure, Vosk, Whisper, Deepgram, ElevenLabs, and Windows built-in recognition
Text-to-Speech with 15+ engines including Azure, Amazon Polly, Google Cloud, IBM Watson, ElevenLabs, OpenAI, TikTok, and System Speech
OSC integration to display speech as text on VRChat avatars via KillFrenzyAvatarText or VRChat Chatbox
Real-time translation into 50+ languages via Azure and DeepL
Spotify and Windows Media integration to show currently playing song in VRChat
Heart rate display via Pulsoid or HRtoVRChat_OSC
VR controller and tracker battery life display via XSOverlay OSC
Voice commands to control VRChat avatar OSC parameters
Word replacements with regex and boundary matching
VoiceWizardPro premium tier with cloud voices and DeepGram Nova-2 STT
OBS text output for streaming and recording
Hotkey support for VR controllers and mouse
publicApiSurface: OSC receive: battery/tracker data from XSOverlay
OSC receive: VRChat contact receiver counters
WebSocket server for external speech recognition input
